문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The [     ] filed a civil lawsuit against the company, demanding full compensation for the financial damages.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The criminal [     ] maintained his innocence throughout the intensive cross-examination.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The judge cited a landmark legal [     ] set by the Supreme Court in a similar case from 2015.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The defense attorney argued that this local court has no [     ] over crimes committed abroad.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The company was sued for a material [     ] of contract after failing to deliver the goods on time.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The state decided to [     ] the corporate executives for tax evasion and embezzlement.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The witness was carefully protected before being called to [     ] in the high-profile murder trial.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The citizen group claimed that the government's sudden decision was completely [     ] and lacked rational grounds.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The court ruled that the signed agreement was [     ] because it was obtained under physical duress.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The defense lawyer presented several mitigating factors to [     ] the severity of the sentence.

보기2: mitigate
보기3: execute

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The parliament is currently drafting new [     ] to strictly regulate artificial intelligence.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.International [     ] were immediately imposed on the nation for violating the global peace treaty.

보기2: permissions
보기3: sanctions
보기4: rewards

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.All financial institutions must ensure full [     ] with the updated anti-money laundering laws.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The reliable [     ] given by the eyewitness proved to be the turning point in the trial.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The Constitutional Court declared the newly passed censorship law [     ].

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.Due to the lack of fingerprints or DNA evidence, the trial ended in a full [     ] for the suspect.

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.Under the relevant [     ], environmental pollution caused by factories is subject to massive fines.
보기1: precedent
보기2: custom

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.Many small businesses try to avoid lengthy [     ] because it consumes too much time and money.

보기2: mediation

문제: 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 가장 알맞은 어휘를 고르시오.The airline denied any legal [     ] for the baggage delays caused by the unexpected severe weather.
보기1: credit
보기2: exemption

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] However, the evidence collected by the investigators was not sufficient.The police arrested the prime suspect near the crime scene. ( [1] ) They searched his apartment thoroughly for any hidden weapons. ( [2] ) Consequently, the prosecutor could not file formal charges immediately. ( [3] ) They had to request an extension to find more decisive proof. ( [4] )
해설: 증거 수집 결과가 부족했다는 역접의 내용이므로, 수색을 마친 뒤([2])와 법적 기소를 못 한 인과 앞자리가 알맞습니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] Neither the suspect nor his accomplices have admitted the crime yet.The police are currently interrogating three individuals involved in the bank robbery. ( [1] ) They have been questioning them in separate rooms for over ten hours. ( [2] ) Despite the lack of confessions, the detective is confident that they will find physical proof soon. ( [3] ) Forensic teams are analyzing the security cameras carefully. ( [4] )
해설: '자백하지 않았다'는 내용은 confessions 명사가 나오는 양보 부사구(Despite the lack of confessions) 바로 앞인 [2]가 완벽합니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] Scarcely had the court opened when the power suddenly went out.The public packed the gallery early in the morning to watch the trial. ( [1] ) The judges walked in and took their seats with serious expressions. ( [2] ) Complete darkness enveloped the room, causing mass confusion among the attendees. ( [3] ) Emergency generators kicked in five minutes later to restore light. ( [4] )
해설: '개정하자마자 정전이 되었다'는 내용이므로, 재판관이 입정해 자리에 앉은 단계인 [2] 뒤에 들어가야 어둠이 찾아온 [3]과 연결됩니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] It is high time the government took strict measures against cybercrimes.Online fraud and identity theft have been increasing at an alarming rate over the past three years. ( [1] ) Millions of citizens have already suffered heavy financial losses. ( [2] ) Public anger is mounting as current regulations fail to punish international hackers effectively. ( [3] ) Without immediate legislative action, the digital environment will become completely unsafe. ( [4] )
해설: 문제 상황과 대중의 분노가 극에 달한 시점([3])에 조치를 취해야 한다는 당위 구문이 들어가는 것이 논리적입니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] The prosecutor demanded that the corporate executive step down immediately.The trial began with a harsh opening statement focusing on organizational corruption. ( [1] ) Documents showed that millions of dollars were illegally funneled into overseas accounts. ( [2] ) This aggressive request shocked the defense team, who expected a more lenient approach. ( [3] ) The judge asked both parties to maintain order before proceeding. ( [4] )
해설: [3] 뒤의 'This aggressive request(이 공격적인 요구)'가 가리키는 지시 대상이 바로 주어진 문장의 '요구했다(demanded)'입니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] Laws passed by the parliament must be respected by all citizens.A democratic society relies heavily on the shared rule of law. ( [1] ) This foundational structure ensures that order is maintained and chaos is prevented. ( [2] ) No individual, regardless of their social status or wealth, is allowed to be above these regulations. ( [3] ) Courts exist precisely to penalize those who willfully choose to disobey them. ( [4] )
해설: 의회에서 통과된 법이 존중받아야 한다는 구체적인 법치 원칙은 민주 사회와 법치 시스템의 기본 구조를 논하는 [2]에 들어맞습니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] The new policy will significantly affect the entire judicial system.The Ministry of Justice announced a comprehensive reform plan yesterday morning. ( [1] ) Legal experts predict that both prosecutors and defense attorneys will face major procedural changes. ( [2] ) Court schedules are also expected to be rearranged to reduce delays. ( [3] ) Ultimately, the goal is to provide faster and fairer trials for all people. ( [4] )
해설: 개혁안 발표([1]) 뒤에 그것이 사법 시스템 전반에 큰 '영향을 미칠 것'이라는 전반적 서술이 오고, [2]부터 전문가 예측 등의 세부 내용이 붙습니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] This is the very legal case which I told you about yesterday.I spent the entire weekend researching digital copyright infringements. ( [1] ) While browsing the supreme court archives, I discovered a highly unusual litigation from 2018. ( [2] ) It involves a complex dispute between an independent artist and a global media conglomerate. ( [3] ) If you read the judge's final verdict, you will understand why it is so relevant to our current project. ( [4] )
해설: 2018년의 특이한 소송을 발견했다는 내용 뒤에, '이것이 바로 내가 어제 말했던 소송 케이스다'라며 지칭하는 [3]이 자연스럽습니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] Despite the heavy rain, the outdoor court session proceeded as scheduled.The historic trial was open to the public in the central courtyard of the palace. ( [1] ) Umbrellas filled the open space, and the ground turned into thick mud within minutes. ( [2] ) However, neither the fierce storm nor the low temperature could stop the enthusiastic crowd. ( [3] ) The judge delivered a historic speech on civil rights that lasted for over two hours. ( [4] )
해설: 폭우에도 야외 재판이 강행되었다는 도입부가 와야, 뒤이어 [1]에서 우산이 가득 차고 진흙탕이 되었다는 묘사가 성립합니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] The jury found it difficult to make a final decision on the complex case.The medical malpractice trial lasted for three weeks with hundreds of pages of technical data. ( [1] ) Expert witnesses from both sides presented completely contradicting scientific reports. ( [2] ) After sitting in the deliberation room for two days, they requested additional guidance from the judge. ( [3] ) They needed clarification on the exact definition of criminal negligence. ( [4] )
해설: 대립하는 보고서 때문에 배심원단이 결정을 내리기 어려워했다는 전개가 와야, [3]에서 '이틀간 심의 후 판사에게 안내를 요청했다'로 이어집니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] He spoke so quietly that his testimony could hardly be heard by the audience.The nervous young witness slowly approached the stand to present his account. ( [1] ) The microphone in front of him was not positioned correctly, worsening the audio quality. ( [2] ) The defense attorney immediately raised his hand and asked him to speak up clearly. ( [3] ) The judge then ordered the court technician to adjust the sound equipment. ( [4] )
해설: 말을 너무 작게 해서 거의 들리지 않았다는 진술이 선행되어야, 변호사가 소리를 높여 달라고 요청한 행동([3])의 원인이 됩니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] If the witness had been present, the truth would have been revealed much sooner.The legal dispute dragged on for months, leaving both parties exhausted and frustrated. ( [1] ) Crucial information regarding the financial transaction was missing from the file. ( [2] ) Unfortunately, she had fled the country a week before the initial hearing took place. ( [3] ) The prosecution spent significant resources trying to locate her whereabouts in Europe. ( [4] )
해설: 주어진 문장의 가정법 과거완료(있었더라면 밝혔을 텐데) 뒤에, '불행히도 그녀는 출국했다'는 실제 사실 지칭문인 [3]이 밀접하게 붙습니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] She is looking forward to starting her legal studies abroad next year.Minji has wanted to become an international human rights lawyer since childhood. ( [1] ) She recently received an official admission letter and a full scholarship from Oxford Law School. ( [2] ) To prepare for this major transition, she is currently taking advanced constitutional law courses online. ( [3] ) She is also practicing her academic English writing every single day. ( [4] )
해설: 장학 입학 허가를 받은 사실([2]) 뒤에, 외국 유학생활을 '기대하고 있다'는 감정이 오고, 이를 위해 [3]에서 현재 준비 중이라는 전개가 어울립니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] The judge asked the defendant where he had spent the night of the crime.The courtroom fell silent as the cross-examination shifted to the suspect's alibi. ( [1] ) He hesitated for a moment, shifting uncomfortably in his wooden chair. ( [2] ) He then claimed that he was sleeping alone in a motel, but he could not produce any receipt. ( [3] ) The prosecutor immediately challenged this statement with traffic camera records. ( [4] )
해설: 판사의 핵심 질문 발화가 있은 직후([1]), 피고인이 망설이다가([2]) 모텔에 있었다고 주장했다([3])는 순서가 정해집니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] No sooner had the verdict been announced than the crowd cheered loudly.The tension in the courthouse was palpable as the foreman stood up to read the paper. ( [1] ) Many family members of the victim had been waiting for justice for over five years. ( [2] ) Security guards quickly moved in to maintain order and prevent people from rushing the floor. ( [3] ) The defense lawyer quietly packed his laptop, looking disappointed with the outcome. ( [4] )
해설: 평결 발표 시 청중이 소리를 질렀다는 상황이 나와야, [3]에서 경비원들이 질서 유지를 위해 즉각 움직였다는 통제 행동이 연결됩니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] The controversial law was amended in order to protect the rights of victims.For decades, criminal justice systems focused primarily on punishing the offenders. ( [1] ) This outdated approach left many harmed individuals feeling neglected and unprotected by the state. ( [2] ) Now, courts must provide legal counselors and psychological support during the trial. ( [3] ) Financial compensation procedures have also been simplified significantly. ( [4] )
해설: 법률이 피해자 보호를 위해 '개정되었다'는 사실이 명시되어야, [3]과 [4]에서 구체적으로 바뀐 지원 제도(상담사 제공 등)가 상술될 수 있습니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] Heavy punishments are intended to prevent people from committing crimes.Law enforcement agencies argue that strict sentencing acts as a powerful deterrent. ( [1] ) When potential offenders see others face long prison terms, they reconsider their actions. ( [2] ) However, some sociologists argue that severe penalties alone cannot solve systemic social issues. ( [3] ) They believe that education and poverty reduction are far more effective in the long run. ( [4] )
해설: 엄벌의 목적이 범죄 예방에 있다는 기론이 [1]에 와야, [1] 뒤에서 억제력(deterrent)이 작동하는 방식에 대한 구체적 부연이 이어집니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] You should have double-checked the contract before signing it.The business partner is now refusing to pay the agreed-upon monthly dividends. ( [1] ) Upon closer inspection, you will find a hidden clause that exempts him during winter. ( [2] ) Regretting your past carelessness will not change the legal reality you face now. ( [3] ) Your only option is to hire an expensive corporate lawyer to find a loophole. ( [4] )
해설: '미리 확인했어야 했다(과거 후회)'라는 대목은 숨겨진 독소 조항을 뒤늦게 발견한 [2]와 후회해봤자 소용없다는 [3] 사이에 오는 것이 좋습니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] The suspect denied stealing any classified documents from the company.The electronics firm discovered that their next-generation chip designs were leaked to a rival. ( [1] ) Internal security logs pointed directly to a senior researcher who had access to the server. ( [2] ) He insisted that he merely copied some personal photos before his resignation. ( [3] ) Nevertheless, the digital forensics team found traces of encrypted files on his laptop. ( [4] )
해설: 문서 절도를 '부인했다'는 내용이 들어가야, [3]에서 '단지 개인 사진만 복사했을 뿐이라고 주장했다(insisted)'로 받아 이어집니다.

문제: 주어진 문장이 들어가기 가장 적절한 곳을 고르시오.[주어진 문장] Freedom of speech is a fundamental right which no government can take away.Citizens must be allowed to express their opinions without fear of censorship. ( [1] ) Even when those opinions are critical of current political leaders, they are protected. ( [2] ) Throughout history, authoritarian regimes have repeatedly tried to silence independent journalists. ( [3] ) However, these oppressive actions always face fierce resistance from the public. ( [4] )
해설: 표현의 자유를 억압 없이 누려야 한다는 첫 문장 뒤에, 그것이 정부가 뺏을 수 없는 '근본적 권리'임을 선언하는 [1]이 위치하기 좋습니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: The evidence collected by the investigators are not sufficient to convict him.
보기2: Neither the manager nor the employees were aware of the security breach.
보기3: The judge asked the prosecutor to present the remaining witnesses.
보기4: Laws passed by parliament must be respected by all citizens.
해설: 주어가 'The evidence(단수명사)'이므로 동사는 복수형인 are가 아니라 단수형인 'is'가 되어야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: The prosecutor demanded that the witness tells the whole truth.
보기2: It is high time the committee made a final decision on the issue.
보기3: Scarcely had the court opened when the power went out.
보기4: The jury found it difficult to reach a unanimous verdict.
해설: demand(요구하다)의 대절(that clause)에는 당위성을 나타내는 (should)+동사원형이 오므로 'step' 또는 'should step'이어야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: No sooner the verdict had been announced than the crowd cheered.
보기2: She is looking forward to starting her internship at the law firm.
보기3: Despite the heavy rain, the outdoor trial proceeded as scheduled.
보기4: The suspect denied stealing any classified files from the server.
해설: No sooner 구문이 문두에 오면 주어와 조동사가 도치되어 'No sooner had the verdict been~'이 되어야 정답입니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: The judge asked the defendant where he has spent the night of the crime.
보기2: Heavy punishments are intended to prevent people from committing crimes.
보기3: You should have double-checked the contract before signing it.
보기4: Freedom of speech is a right which no government can take away.
해설: 주절의 시제가 과거(asked)이고 물어본 시점보다 범죄 밤이 더 과거이므로 현재완료가 아닌 과거완료 'had spent'를 써야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: This is the very legal case what I told you about yesterday morning.
보기2: The new policy will significantly affect the entire judicial system.
보기3: Legal regulations are amended in order to protect victims' rights.
보기4: He spoke so quietly that his testimony could hardly be heard.
해설: 선행사(the very legal case)가 명백히 존재하므로 선행사를 포함하는 관계대명사 what 대신 'which' 또는 'that'을 써야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: If the primary witness were present, the truth would have been revealed.
보기2: The suspect was arrested on the grounds that he had lied about his alibi.
보기3: The company was sued for a material breach of the original contract.
보기4: The defense attorney argued that the decision was entirely arbitrary.
해설: 주절이 'would have been revealed(과거완료)'이므로 조건절도 가정법 과거완료인 'had been present'가 되어야 어법상 맞습니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: Many international corporations fail to complying with local tax laws.
보기2: The judge ruled that the signed agreement was null and void.
보기3: In accordance with legal procedures, the warrant was issued quickly.
보기4: The expert witness provided critical testimony during the trial.
해설: 'fail'은 목적으로 to부정사만을 취하는 동사이므로 fail to complying을 'fail to comply'로 고쳐야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: The defense attorney presented several factors to aggressive mitigate the sentence.
보기2: The court has no jurisdiction over crimes committed in another country.
보기3: The parliament passed new legislation to regulate digital fraud.
보기4: Economic sanctions were imposed on the nation for violating the treaty.
해설: to부정사를 수식하거나 문맥상 '경감하다'를 꾸미기 위해서는 형용사 aggressive가 아닌 부사 'significantly' 혹은 'aggressively' 형태로 동사 앞에 오거나 뒤로 빠져야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: The suspect was released because the initial warrant deemed to be illegal.
보기2: The lack of physical evidence led to an immediate acquittal.
보기3: Under the relevant statute, workplace discrimination is strictly banned.
보기4: High costs often deter ordinary citizens from engaging in litigation.
해설: 영장이나 법률 등은 위헌이나 불법으로 '간주되는(수동)' 대상이므로, 'was deemed to be' 수동태 형식을 취해야 옳습니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: All citizens are entitled to receiving equal protection under the law.
보기2: The manufacturer denied any liability for the defective machinery.
보기3: The prosecutor spent months trying to locate the suspect's whereabouts.
보기4: The continuous disputes turned out to be completely false.
해설: 'be entitled to' 구문에서 to는 to부정사의 to이므로 동사원형인 'receive'가 와야 올바른 구문입니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: In criminal trials, the prosecution must bears the burden of proof.
보기2: He was subject to severe penalties for operating without a license.
보기3: They took immediate steps to protect the confidential database.
보기4: In the face of strong opposition, the new law was finally passed.
해설: 조동사 must 뒤에는 항상 동사의 원형이 와야 하므로 bears를 'bear'로 고쳐야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: They established the fund with a view to help the families of victims.
보기2: The rules were designed so as to ensure public health and safety.
보기3: The citizens are bound by the strict terms of the social contract.
보기4: With respect to intellectual property rights, the law is very clear.
해설: 'with a view to'에서 to는 전치사이므로 뒤에 동명사가 결합해야 합니다. 따라서 help를 'helping'으로 고쳐야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: The international community decided to put an end of the long conflict.
보기2: The defense attorney objected to the prosecutor's aggressive line of questioning.
보기3: The court session was delayed due to the absence of a key juror.
보기4: The new evidence proved that the suspect was completely innocent.
해설: '~을 종식시키다, 끝내다'라는 뜻의 정확한 구문 관용어는 put an end of가 아니라 'put an end to'입니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: Although the heavy rain, the outdoor law enforcement ceremony continued.
보기2: The suspect refused to answer questions without his lawyer present.
보기3: The Supreme Court has the final authority to interpret the constitution.
보기4: He was acquitted of all charges due to a lack of decisive proof.
해설: 'the heavy rain'이라는 명사구가 뒤에 이어지고 있으므로 접속사인 Although 대신 전치사인 'Despite' 또는 'In spite of'가 와야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: The police are looking for the witness whom testimony changed yesterday.
보기2: The defendant was found guilty of driving under the influence of alcohol.
보기3: The legal system is designed to provide justice for all members of society.
보기4: It is crucial that every citizen understand their basic constitutional rights.
해설: 선행사(the witness)와 뒤의 명사(testimony)가 '그 증인의 증언'이라는 소유 관계를 이루므로 관계대명사는 'whose'를 써야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: The judge ordered the corporate executive to paid a massive fine.
보기2: The contract will become effective as soon as both parties sign it.
보기3: He denies having any connection with the illegal gambling website.
보기4: The lawyer spent the whole night preparing for the cross-examination.
해설: 'order + 목적어 + to부정사' 구조이므로 to 뒤에는 동사원형인 'pay'가 와야 마땅합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: Under no circumstances the defendant should contact the victims directly.
보기2: Seldom have we seen such a complex legal dispute in this court.
보기3: The prosecutor showed the jury the weapon used in the crime.
보기4: The witness felt threatened by the aggressive behavior of the suspect.
해설: 'Under no circumstances'라는 부정어구가 문두에 나오면 주어와 조동사가 도치되어 'should the defendant contact'가 되어야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: This is the law firm where my brother works there as a senior partner.
보기2: The Supreme Court overruled the decision made by the appellate court.
보기3: The new regulation aims to prevent companies from exploiting workers.
보기4: He was given a lenient sentence considering his clean criminal record.
해설: 관계부사 where가 이끄는 절 안에는 부사요소인 there가 중복되어 존재하면 안 되므로 'there'를 삭제해야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: I would rather go to court than settling this dispute out of court.
보기2: The suspect chose to remain silent during the entire interrogation.
보기3: The judge has the power to dismiss the case if there is no merit.
보기4: She has been working as a public defender for over fifteen years.
해설: 'would rather A than B' 구문에서 조동사 뒤에 걸리는 A(go)와 B는 병렬구조를 이루어야 하므로 settling을 동사원형 'settle'로 바꿔야 합니다.

문제: 다음 중 어법상 가장 어색한(틀린) 문장을 고르시오.
보기1: The committee consists of seven judges appointing by the president.
보기2: The defendant expressed deep remorse for the pain he had caused.
보기3: The legal framework ensures that property rights are fully protected.
보기4: He was caught attempting to bribe a high-ranking judicial official.
해설: 재판관들은 대통령에 의해 '임명되는(수동)' 대상이므로 현재분사 appointing을 과거분사인 'appointed'로 수정해야 어법상 옳습니다.
